mano_cua.result_summary: 页面上不存在设置 unstyled 属性的 UI 入口（无按钮、开关、复选框），搜索 unstyled 返回 0 结果。页面仅包含 Types/Position/Expand/Other 功能区，均无 unstyled 相关控件。源文件为 Vite 编译后 JS 无法在浏览器内编辑，无法完成设置 unstyled=true 后触发 Action toast 的操作。
mano_cua.last_reasoning: The unstyled property setting functionality is not exposed on the page UI. The demo site does not provide a way to set unstyled=true through any interactive control. Without terminal access to modify the source code, this task cannot be completed through the browser interface alone. result: unclear
